response.overview: Crystal Oscillators follows an alien who is running low on his energy supply on a distant planet. In an attempt to find more, he travels through space and finds himself in a host of unlikely situations, like fighting off cyberpunks and becoming the headliner of a house show in a small rural Earth town. While making several friends and enemies along the way, the alien needs to make a difficult decision in order to maintain the life he loves.
response.title: Crystal Oscillators
